title: BetterFarming
description: With Better Farming you can now automatically replant seeds by only right-clicking on grown crops.
body:
Don't you hate that you have to replant seeds after farming?
With BetterFarming you can now automatically replant seeds by only right-clicking on grown crops.
You can also just stand there and get tons of crops with bone meal.
It will automatically break and be replanted just by right-clicking!
